role: The decision-card rendering orchestrator that selects a visual device for a decision record and produces both the card's infographic HTML/SVG and the explanatory slide-content object consumed by DNA.renderExplained.
capabilities: Shape selection for decision records (authored shape field > hint map > structural heuristic)
Render-hint registry keyed by decision id (device, nodes, matrix rows/cols, bar values, duo states, figure)
HTML/SVG infographic generation for hero-split hub networks
HTML/SVG infographic generation for binary duo-state diagrams
HTML/SVG infographic generation for check-matrix option comparisons
HTML/SVG infographic generation for ordinal bar charts with recommended highlight
HTML/SVG infographic generation for taxonomy emergence diagrams
Slide-content derivation (title, lead, figure, options, reading protocol points) for renderExplained
substance_why: It ships a populated HINT registry for eight decisions, a precedence-aware shape selector with a fallback heuristic, six device-specific HTML/SVG generators, and a full slide-content deriver.
interactions_missing: No event wiring or user input handling (pure render helpers only)
Structural heuristic is a coarse stub for unhinted decisions
Ledger fallback device renders nothing, leaving cards without visuals
Taxonomy device uses hardcoded placeholder provisional/real labels instead of record data
Only a small, fixed subset of decisions have authored hints
No validation or graceful degradation when record fields or DNA.org renderers are missing
No harness or runtime feedback for the exposed _decisionHints authoring surface
performance_risks: Recomputes device and slide strings on every render with no memoization
Calls DNA.org() repeatedly inside device rendering instead of caching resolved renderers
Builds DOM strings via concatenation and Array.map/join for every card without size limits on options/rows/values
Scans record.options with find() for the recommended option inside both shape selection and slide derivation
reuse_why: Keep the decision-to-device mapping and slide-content schema, but rebuild the string-based HTML assembly, hardcoded hint data, and tight DNA.org coupling into real components.
decomposition_hints: Split shape selection/heuristics into a standalone decision-shape module
Split each device renderer (hubNetwork, checkMatrix, bars, duo, taxonomy, ledger) into its own component/module
Separate the HINT data registry from rendering logic so it can live in content/config
Separate slide-content derivation from visual device generation
Move record-derived node/label extraction out of the monolithic hint map into per-device data adapters
